title: Verify clean restart loaded new .env config — confirm gates enforcing at new thresholds
status: QUEUED — requires operator cold restart first
depends_on: Operator must: (1) kill all running stack processes, (2) delete __pycache__/bot_core.cpython-*.pyc, (3) relaunch via launch_all.py — BEFORE this task runs

context.problem: Tonight's bot ran with stale config at every restart. config_hash stayed '2f0dd9e0ef8a' across multiple restarts while .env had been edited. The live process opened trades at conf=0.43 and entry=0.01 after gates were supposedly live. The .env was updated to MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE=0.65 and MIN_ENTRY_PRICE=0.22 but neither was ever picked up.
evidence: State.json at 04:19 UTC: config_hash='2f0dd9e0ef8a' unchanged from 03:49 UTC snapshot
Trade #306: conf=0.4279, entry=0.1407 — violates both new thresholds
Trade #310: conf=0.5507, entry=0.01005 — model assigned 55% confidence to near-resolved market
Session_start_ts changed at ~04:14 UTC (another restart) but config_hash unchanged
context.risk: If tomorrow's restart also fails to load the new config, every trade opened is ungated. Must verify config pickup before trusting any live behavior.

objective: Confirm the restarted bot process loaded the corrected .env values by reading live runtime state and early log entries. Do not trust any live trade behavior until this verification passes.
required_work: 1. Read runtime/state.json immediately after relaunch. Record config_hash. Confirm it is NOT '2f0dd9e0ef8a'.
2. Read the fresh bot log. Find the startup banner line that prints min_conf. Confirm it shows 0.65 (not 0.25 or 0.60).
3. Wait for at least one bridge loop cycle. Find BRIDGE GATE REJECT entries in the log. Confirm confidence rejections are firing at 0.65 threshold.
4. Confirm no new trade was opened with confidence < 0.65 or entry_px < 0.22.
5. Check process topology: confirm only one bot_core process is running (no duplicate PIDs).
6. Confirm session_start_ts in state.json matches the fresh relaunch time (not a stale prior session).
acceptance_criteria: config_hash in state.json is different from '2f0dd9e0ef8a'
Bot log startup line shows min_conf=0.65 (or shows the correct loaded threshold)
At least one BRIDGE GATE REJECT log entry confirms confidence threshold is 0.65
No trade opened post-restart with confidence < 0.65
No trade opened post-restart with entry_px < 0.22
session_start_ts is fresh (within 5 minutes of relaunch)
verification_required: Quote the exact config_hash from the new state.json
Quote the startup min_conf line from the log
Quote at least one BRIDGE GATE REJECT line showing the 0.65 threshold
State PASS or FAIL for each acceptance criterion
If any criterion FAILs, do NOT open worker code tasks — flag the failure and stop
